leadText: The Rocky Helmet (Japanese: ゴツゴツメット Rugged Helmet) is a type of held item introduced in Generation V. It damages Pokémon that hit the holder with contact moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If a Pokémon uses a move that makes contact with a Pokémon holding a Rocky Helmet, the Pokémon that used the move takes damage equal to 1/6 of its maximum HP . Each individual strike from a multistrike move that makes contact will activate the Rocky Helmet. If a Pokémon using Thief , Covet , or Knock Off or that has the Ability Magician faints due to the target's held Rocky Helmet, it cannot steal or remove the target's Rocky Helmet. Generations V and VI [ edit | edit source ] In link battles and battle facilities, if two Trainers ' Pokémon faint at the same time due to a held Rocky Helmet, the Trainer whose Pokémon held the Rocky Helmet wins. Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] Due to a bug , in version 1.0 of Pokémon Sun and Moon , in link battles and battle facilities, if two Trainers' Pokémon faint at the same time due to a held Rocky Helmet, the Trainer whose Pokémon held the Rocky Helmet wins. From version 1.1 of Pokémon Sun and Moon onward, the Trainer whose Pokémon did not hold the Rocky Helmet wins.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 If the holder of this item takes damage, the attacker will also be damaged upon contact. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder is hit, the attacker will also be damaged upon contact. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. If another Pokémon makes direct contact with the holder, that Pokémon will be damaged. ZA An item to be held by a Pokémon. This helmet damages any attacker that makes direct contact with the holder.
